items.briefing:
Australian tax agents are being warned to tighten security around client logins to prevent tax fraud, as criminals increasingly target these accounts during tax season. Separately, a global report highlights how schools and training organisations face serious risks from third-party vendors — a timely reminder for RTOs to check the security practices of any software providers or contractors handling student data.

On a broader note, AI use in Australia and New Zealand is growing faster than the rules and oversight meant to govern it, raising concerns about unchecked risks in workplaces.

**Tip:** Review which third-party tools have access to your student or client data, and confirm those vendors have basic security protections in place.

featured.title: Why Australian tax agents need to secure every customer login to prevent the next wave of tax fraud
featured.quote: Stolen ATO credentials fueling tax fraud directly threatens Australian taxpayers and financial security.
